title: Some Stuff - Dust & Ore
description: Some Stuff – Dust & Ore is a visual overhaul that reimagines some raw ores and dusts and more, made by BoboTweaks
body:
# **Some Stuff – Dust & Ore** is a visual refresh for some materials

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abd94826eda68d75b62c6a2ae08c5c83f68fdc90.png)

it supports some vanilla materials, [**Dust & Ore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ores), [**Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ore-raw-ore-expansion) and [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)


you may also like my other projects [**Dust & Ore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ores) and [**Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ore-raw-ore-expansion) and [**Some Stuff - Tools By BoboTweaks**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/some-stuff-tools-by-bobotweaks)
